title: Hotdog Mod
description: Adds a new best food item being hotdogs with a reasonable crafting tree.
body:
This mod adds a couple new food items along a crafting tree to craft the "Hotdog with Mustard".
these items are the...
- Raw Wiener
- Cooked Wiener
- Hotdog Bun
- Hotdog
- Mustard
- Mustard Seeds

All to craft the Hotdog with Mustard. 

_The mustard seeds are their own crop with stages 0-7_
